other_observers: I found the bird alone, I saw it on 9/22 with Glenn Walbek, David Chartier, Robb Hinds, and Mark Miller. Seen with Joyce Takamine on 9/23.; I found this bird, not sure if anyone else saw it or not.
specific_location: Osprey Picnic Area, Rock Canyon, below Pueblo Reservoir dam.
description: Vireo with blue head contrasting with bright white throat. See photos.Behaviors: Seen with a Philadelphia Vireo on day 1, moving slowly in the leaves.Call: nonePlumage: fall
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
